summary: ChatFlow - A full-stack web messaging application similar to WhatsApp with modern UI, polling-based message updates, user authentication, private and group messaging, media sharing, and admin panel
architectural_notes: Polling-based message updates (every few seconds) instead of WebSockets
Database collections: Users, Conversations, Messages, Groups
Message editing/deletion limited to 5 minutes after sending
Green accent color theme similar to WhatsApp
Sender and receiver use different message bubble colors
known_issues: No real-time WebSocket support - using polling instead
No typing indicators or live online/offline status

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication system using Internet Identity supporting passkeys, Google, Apple, and Microsoft login methods with secure session management
Create user profile system with avatar image upload, status message field, username display, and profile editing capability
Build one-to-one private messaging system with scrollable chat history, message timestamps, auto-scroll to latest message, and ability to create new chats by searching username
Implement contact list sidebar showing all conversations with last message preview, unread message counter badge, and delete conversation option
Create group chat functionality with group creation, member add/remove capability, group name and avatar settings, admin role assignment, and display of sender name for each message in group
Implement image and file upload system with support for images (JPG, PNG) and documents (PDF, DOC), in-chat image preview, and file download functionality
Add message editing and deletion features allowing users to edit or delete their own messages within 5 minutes of sending, with 'delete for everyone' option
Implement search functionality within conversations to find specific messages by text content
Integrate emoji picker component allowing users to insert emojis into messages

Create WhatsApp-inspired responsive UI with sidebar for chat list, main chat window with rounded message bubbles (different colors for sender/receiver), dark/light mode toggle, green accent color theme, smooth animations, and mobile/desktop responsive layout
Build admin panel accessible to admin users showing total user count, total message count, and ability to disable/enable user accounts

new_feature_requests.summary: User authentication system with Internet Identity (passkeys + social login)
User profile page with avatar upload and status message
One-to-one private messaging with chat history
Contact list sidebar with last message preview
Group chat with member management and admin roles
Image and file upload/sharing with preview and download
Message editing and deletion within 5 minutes
WhatsApp-inspired UI with dark/light mode toggle
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
Admin panel to view statistics and manage users
Implement auto-refresh polling mechanism that checks for new messages every 3-5 seconds and updates chat UI without requiring manual page refresh
